isolation.constraint: Stayed on Snapshot Viewer tab only; did not modify era filter

assertions.title: Simulation Snapshot Viewer

steps.expected: Snapshot Viewer with experiment selector and chart area
steps.observed: Snapshot Viewer tab displayed with experiment dropdown, tick controls (⏮ ◀ ▶ ⏭ ⏯ Animate), and empty Plotly chart

steps.expected: Chart renders with multiple metric traces
steps.observed: Chart renders with 5 metric traces: Overall Score (blue), Recall Mean (green), Precision Mean (orange), Plausibility Score (purple), MRR Mean (red). All at 11 ticks (0,20,...,200).

steps.expected: Tick indicator moves to next position
steps.observed: Red dashed vertical line moves to next tick position with 'Tick N' annotation
All stepping buttons work correctly, moving tick indicator to first/prev/next/last position
Animation button starts/stops automatic tick progression at 1.5s intervals

steps.action: Hover on chart and check tooltip
steps.expected: Tooltip shows experiment ID, metric name, value at 4 decimal places, tick
steps.observed: Tooltip shows: 'exp_lme_0008', metric name, value at 4 decimal places (e.g., 'Overall Score: 0.5398'), and tick number

steps.expected: Values match snapshots array in results.json
steps.observed: 8 data points across 3 metrics verified — all match results.json exactly

steps.action: Verify distinct from detail view mini-charts
steps.expected: More metrics (5 vs 3) and stepping controls
steps.observed: 5 metrics vs 3 in mini-charts, plus stepping controls and animation mode

evidence: Snapshot viewer has experiment selector dropdown, tick controls, and Plotly chart
Chart shows 5 metric traces with unique colors and legend
Red dashed vertical line indicates current tick
Tooltip format: exp_lme_0008 / Metric: 0.XXXX / Tick: N
Data spot-checked against results.json: all 8 values match

frictions.description: Dropdown has 434+ entries requiring search to navigate to specific experiment
frictions.resolution: Used dropdown search functionality to find exp_lme_0008

summary: VAL-PARAMS-002: PASS — Snapshot Viewer is a standalone tab with experiment selector, 5 metric traces (overall, recall, precision, plausibility, mrr), 11 ticks (0-200), stepping controls (⏮◀▶⏭), animation mode (⏯), 4-decimal-place tooltips, and data matching results.json. Distinct from detail view mini-charts (5 metrics vs 3, plus stepping/animation controls).
